_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Maxblis White House
project.address: Plot No. GH-10, Eco City, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.description: Maxblis White House is a premium ready-to-move residential complex in Sector 75, Noida, offering sprawling 2, 3, and 4 BHK family apartments.
project.long_description: Maxblis White House is a premier ready-to-move-in residential complex spread over 8 acres in Central Noida, Sector 75. Developed by the highly acclaimed builder Maxblis Construction Pvt. Ltd., the project houses 600 premium apartments across 9 elegant high-rise towers rising G+18 floors. Renowned for its generous floor configurations, the project is a favorite for buyers who prioritize large bedroom carpet sizes and open layouts. Standard unit finishes include premium vitrified tile flooring, laminated wooden master bedroom layouts, hardwood door trim selections, and fully-functional modular kitchens. The gated complex features a rich array of standard active lifestyle amenities including an adult swimming pool, a dedicated kid's pool, a fully-equipped gymnasium, and multiple beautifully landscaped parks. Located right opposite the Noida Sector 50 Metro Station and just 100 meters walking distance from the Spectrum Metro Mall, the project delivers unparalleled daily convenience. Resale buyers should perform standard title checks to verify individual flat registry status.
marketing_claims: 70% Landscaped Open Area with Central Parks
Double Balcony Systems with Lush Garden Views
project.project_risk_flag: Low-Moderate: Part of the legacy Eco City consortium land dues, registries are active and ongoing but require individual unit stamp ledger verifications.
registry_embargo_reasons: Slow registration speed due to Eco City land lease dues resolution timelines.

builder.name: Maxblis Construction Private Limited
builder.company_overview: Maxblis Construction Private Limited is a reliable mid-segment real estate developer in Noida. Known for practical spatial planning, sturdy build standards, and reliable structural deliveries, the builder's flagship portfolio includes Maxblis White House and Maxblis Grand Kingston, delivering comfortable multi-family apartments across central NCR.

connectivity.name: Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital
connectivity.notes: Premium emergency healthcare across the road

assumptions: Ready-to-move resale unit purchase. GST is 0%.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Maxblis White House represents a highly practical and budget-friendly ready-to-move complex in Sector 75, offering massive 3 and 4 BHK layouts, though impacted by typical consortium registry delays.
why_buy: Massive Layout Sizes: 3 BHK at 1,820 sqft and 4 BHK at 2,250 sqft provide massive room sizes.
Metro Access: Directly opposite the Noida Sector 50 Metro Station.
Rich Light & Ventilation: Three-side open layouts allow maximum natural daylighting.
Excellent Pricing Value: Resale rates are highly competitive for these room sizes.
why_avoid: Sub-leased Consortium Land: Built under the Eco City SPC, exposing it to the wider ₹1,717 Cr dues dispute.
Slow Registries: Registries are slow and require careful title verification.
Higher Age Profile: Gated common spaces require active maintenance upgrades from the AOA.
decision_profile.best_for: Growing families prioritizing large indoor room spaces and direct metro connectivity at a competitive price point.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Budget buyers with under ₹1.2 Crore budgets or flippers seeking rapid capital appreciation.

buyerPersonas.headline: Huge rooms and metro proximity
reasons: 1,820 sqft 3 BHK offers sprawling living and double balconies.
Gated layout with swimming pool and active gym facilities.

riskRadar.description: Registries are slow but proceeding under the Noida Authority rehab package. Verify individual seller ledger.
Gated society is fully operational, minor cosmetic upgrades needed in common towers.

transparency_checks.label: RERA Registered
transparency_checks.details: Registered as UPRERAPRJ9906 (Phase II) / UPRERAPRJ7418 (Phase III).

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: Phase III completed and CC issued around 2021.

transparency_checks.label: Registry Active
transparency_checks.details: Partially active; slow execution under December 2023 rehab package.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: Escrow was verified during project construction cycles.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: No active NCLT bankruptcy against Maxblis Construction Pvt Ltd.

investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly popular among IT managers; 3 BHK rental commands ₹35,000 to ₹48,000/month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Consistent buyer demand due to ready possession and metro walking distance.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Registered units liquidate rapidly within 30 days.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Middle-income families upgrading from Sector 62 or Indirapuram seeking sprawling 3 BHK room sizes and direct metro access.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate (preferring ready, spacious living environments, willing to run thorough title checks)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with school-going children and elderly parents
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT hubs or Noida Expressway
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to acquire very large 3 or 4 BHK family apartments at a highly competitive resale price, enjoying immediate walking access to Sector 50 Metro and Spectrum Mall.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: A highly robust, exceptionally spacious ready-to-move society right next to the metro. It offers top-tier floor plans. Ensure you choose a resale flat that has a fully cleared registry chain.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Superb spacious living. Massive bedrooms, large drawing lounges, and highly functional cross-ventilation. Excellent connectivity ensures daily life is highly practical.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Excellent asset for steady monthly rental yields and strong capital preservation in mature central Noida.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Very secure gated setup with active parks, swimming pool, and sports play areas for children.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Highly predictable yields (3.8-4.2%) due to excellent metro location popularity.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Features good standard luxury fittings, laminated wood layouts, and modular setups, though common lobbies are standard rather than ultra-luxury.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Low construction and low financial risk. Main check is verifying individual unit stamp registry clearance.
walk_away_conditions: Unwillingness of seller to clear any pending municipal ledger dues prior to registry.
Units showing poor ceiling maintenance or water seepages.
negotiation_leverage: Highlight the general consortium dues issue to negotiate a slight discount from the seller.
Benchmark against older Sector 76 societies to drive down per-sqft pricing.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: A highly practical choice. Finalize your purchase if a verified registered 3 BHK (1,820 sqft) is available under ₹2.35 Cr.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Slightly larger standard 3 BHK super areas (1,820 sqft vs 1,732 sqft); closer metro exit.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Slightly premium construction finishes and more modern tower layouts.
competitors.verdict: Choose Maxblis for absolute room sizes; choose Apex Athena for premium layout finishes.
